mapper.sql: id, phrase, meaning_zh, usage_note, category, difficulty, skill_tags, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT p.*, sr.status AS study_status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_content_links cl WHERE cl.target_type = 'PHRASE' AND cl.target_id = p.id) AS link_count FROM ielts_phrases p LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'PHRASE' AND sr.content_id = p.id
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_phrases p LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'PHRASE' AND sr.content_id = p.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ielts_phrases (id, phrase, meaning_zh, usage_note, category, difficulty, skill_tags, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{phrase}, #{meaningZh}, #{usageNote}, #{category}, #{difficulty}, #{skillTags}, #{topicTags}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE ielts_phrases SET phrase = #{phrase}, meaning_zh = #{meaningZh}, usage_note = #{usageNote}, category = #{category}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, skill_tags = #{skillTags}, topic_tags = #{topicTags}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ielts_phrases (id, phrase, meaning_zh, usage_note, category, difficulty, skill_tags, topic_tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{p.id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{p.phrase}, #{p.meaningZh}, #{p.usageNote}, #{p.category}, #{p.difficulty}, #{p.skillTags}, #{p.topicTags}, #{p.createdAt}, #{p.updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM ielts_phrases p WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ielts_study_records sr WHERE sr.content_type = 'PHRASE' AND sr.content_id = p.id ) ORDER BY p.difficulty, p.id LIMIT #{limit}
